content_body: We had a fantastic time. The view is spectacular! The cabin is so beautiful and tranquil. My husband surprised me with a surprise weekend getaway here. It was wonderful to hike around the trails. Twin Branch Falls and the 270' suspension bridge were breathtaking. We also tried the different cuisine. We really recommend the Cucina Rustica and the Toccoa River House. The best cafe we've ever been to was the Lilly Pad Cafe. Thank you so much for such a lovely time. We will definitely be back to try the scenic railroad tour and spend some time in the mountains.
title: Surprise Weekend Getaway
